name: @pryzm/constraint-solver
description: PRYZM 2 — 2D geometric constraint solver (S52). Wraps the planegcs WASM behind a `SolverPorter` contract so the Element Creator's sketcher can solve up to 50-constraint systems in < 16 ms (per phase doc §4.1 exit criterion). Real planegcs WASM binding lands at S53 alongside the 2D sketcher canvas in `apps/component-editor`; the package ships today with a `MockSolver` that handles the five first constraint kinds (distance-pp, parallel, perpendicular, coincident-pp, fixed) used by snapshot tests + the porter contract validation.
